features: Firm end rounded filaments for a thorough clean
Large head with angled filaments to help clean in between
Effective tongue cleaner to remove bacteria for fresher breath
Ergonomically designed handle for ultimate brushing control
description: Product Description A toothbrush that has been designed to offer advanced in between cleaning with effective stain removal to help give you that whiter smile. Directions Brush twice a day for two minutes, clean all surfaces of teeth and tongue, replace every 3-4 months Safety Warning Replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Brush twice a day for two minutes, cleaning all surfaces of teeth and tongue. Be cautious when using the firm bristles to avoid discomfort. Dispose of responsibly after use, following local recycling guidelines. See more
